component_policy.nominal_intervention_policy: plant_intervenor is present only as an inactive legacy GraphSpec compatibility component; no robust/minimax adversary is scheduled.

catch_trials.semantics: target remains visible, movement target is replaced by the initial position, and DelayedReachTaskInputs.hold stays 1 for the full trial

delayed_reach.multi_target_contract: same structured target-relative target bank as non-delayed rows

cost.feedbax_force_filter_state_cost_note: Full analytical Q/R/Q_f loss scores force/filter and disturbance-integrator state through the canonical delay-augmented C&S Q_t and Q_f matrices.
cost.schedule: C&S Eq. 15 physical 8-state schedule with 5-step delay distribution

delayed_reach_projection.cost_indexing: canonical Q/R/Q_f schedule starts at sampled go cue
delayed_reach_projection.prep_epoch: not part of canonical movement-stage C&S cost

game_card_provenance.gamma_usage: Recorded for C&S provenance only. This nominal run has no robust/minimax adversarial phase and does not claim a certificate pass.

plant.bw_contract: top physical 8x8 block is identity; lag rows are zero

graph_export.reason: C&S cs_lss runs use LinearStateSpace mechanics and delayed position/velocity feedback; the current compatibility GraphSpec builder serializes the legacy FirstOrderFilter -> PointMass path.

control_r.source: canonical C&S schedule.R on intended controller command before efferent/motor-channel noise

catch_trials.semantics: target remains visible, movement target is replaced by the initial position, and DelayedReachTaskInputs.hold stays 1 for the full trial

delayed_reach.multi_target_contract: same structured target-relative target bank as non-delayed rows

delayed_trial_type_normalization.semantics: When enabled, split full_analytical_qrf into no-catch and catch terms, normalize each over its selected trial type, then combine with explicit weights so p_catch controls sampling rather than implicit objective dilution.

state_basis.coordinate_transform: absolute Feedbax position entries are converted to target-centred analytical coordinates before applying Q_t and Q_f

time_indexing.running_state: state before each movement command from sampled go cue
time_indexing.terminal_state: state after 60 movement commands from sampled go cue

model_structure.certificate_claim: I/O map certificate framing only; the output-feedback GRU is not fed the 48D delay-augmented analytical state and is not claimed to share same-coordinate gains with the analytical controller.

catch_trials.semantics: target remains visible, movement target is replaced by the initial position, and DelayedReachTaskInputs.hold stays 1 for the full trial

delayed_reach.multi_target_contract: same structured target-relative target bank as non-delayed rows

efferent.noise_timing: Feedbax efferent Channel immediately before LinearStateSpace.force

feedback.noise_timing: Feedbax sensory Channel after delayed LSS feedback selector

initial_hidden_encoder.initialization_note: Exact zero affine weights and bias preserve the zero-H0 baseline at initialization while remaining trainable through ordinary rollout loss.

plant_process.epsilon_bridge: sampled physical-process/load epsilon Task input bound to C&S LinearStateSpace mechanics.epsilon using the physical block of the released C&S process covariance

projection_notes.additive_motor: Project C&S input-image motor covariance to command-channel additive noise with std sqrt(motor_covariance_scale).
projection_notes.plant_process: Project C&S process/load covariance to independent force noise immediately upstream of mechanics, after the force filter.
projection_notes.sensory: Use the C&S sensory covariance diagonal standard deviation on the Feedbax delayed pos/vel feedback channel.
projection_notes.signal_dependent_motor: Use the C&S Csdn scale as Feedbax pre-force-filter multiplicative command noise.
projection_notes.state_diffusion: No arbitrary full-state diffusion is used in Feedbax GRU rollout.

stochastic_runtime.command_runtime: Feedbax efferent Channel immediately before LinearStateSpace.force; additive and signal-dependent motor noise are both command-channel noise
stochastic_runtime.plant_process_runtime: Task-sampled physical-process/load epsilon bound to LinearStateSpace.epsilon
stochastic_runtime.sensory_runtime: Feedbax sensory Channel after the 4D delayed LSS feedback selector; the delay itself is represented by the C&S 48D LSS state
